location_desc: We need your location to show products and shops near you. We'll try to auto-detect your city.
login_to_view_wishlist: Please login to view your wishlist items.
confirm_remove_wishlist_item: Do you really want to remove this item from wishlist?
confirm_clear_wishlist: Do you really want to clear your wishlist?
area_filter_sync_home: Area filter is synced with the Home page area feed selection.
no_shop_for_location: No shop is currently listed for this location.
no_shop_for_category_suffix: shop is listed in this location.
area_filter_sync_with_values_prefix: Area filter is synced from the Home page:
no_services_for_filter: No service is available for this filter.
explore_all_categories: Explore every category at Mohito Mart
no_products_for_category_location: No product is available for this category in the selected location.
followed_feed_subtitle: Random picks from the shops you follow.
no_followed_products: No products are available from followed shops yet. Follow shops to see their products here.
newly_added_products_not_available: Newly added products are not available right now.
showing_products_all_shops: Showing products from all available shops
nearby_products_not_available: Nearby products are not available right now.
end_of_feed: You have reached the end of this feed.
about_us_intro: Mohito Mart is a local-first marketplace where users can quickly discover nearby shops, products, and services. Our focus is a simple experience, trusted listings, and neighborhood-level relevance.
what_we_do_desc: Through a city and area-based feed, we show users nearby products and services. Shop owners can manage their listings and reach a local audience.
our_vision_desc: Our vision is to make local commerce digital and accessible so both small and large businesses can grow efficiently.
transparency_desc: We prioritize user privacy, clear policies, and responsible data handling.
terms_platform_use_desc: By using Mohito Mart, you agree to provide accurate information, perform lawful activities, and follow platform policies.
terms_listings_desc: Product/service details, prices, stock, and timings are provided by shop owners. Mohito Mart does not fully guarantee third-party listing accuracy.
terms_user_accounts_desc: Keeping account credentials secure is the user's responsibility. Access may be suspended or restricted for suspicious use or policy violations.
terms_prohibited_desc: Spam, fraud, abusive behavior, unauthorized scraping, or platform misuse is strictly prohibited.
terms_liability_desc: Due to the intermediary nature of a marketplace, Mohito Mart follows a limited liability principle for direct seller obligations or third-party disputes.
terms_policy_updates_desc: Terms may be updated from time to time. Continued use will be treated as acceptance of the updated terms.
privacy_data_collect_desc: Account details (name/email), selected location information (city/area), and platform activity data may be collected to improve service quality.
privacy_data_use_desc: Data is used for nearby product/service recommendations, account security, personalization, and operational analytics.
privacy_location_desc: Location permission is optional. If you allow it, location data is used to provide a relevant city/area feed.
privacy_sharing_desc: We do not sell personal data to unauthorized third parties. Limited sharing happens only for service operations, compliance, or legal obligations.
privacy_security_desc: Reasonable technical and operational safeguards are applied, but absolute security cannot be guaranteed in internet-based systems.
privacy_choices_desc: You can update your profile data and change location preferences. For additional privacy requests, contact support.
contact_us_intro: Contact us for account, listing, payment, or general platform queries. Our team responds within working hours.
